creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
When trying to build port:

===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Warning: port uses /usr/local/var instead of /var
Error: Bad linking on [libedit.so.7] for /usr/local/bin/kadmin please add USES=libedit
Error: Bad linking on [libedit.so.7] for /usr/local/bin/ktutil please add USES=libedit
Error: Bad linking on [libedit.so.7] for /usr/local/sbin/kadmin.local please add USES=libedit
*** Error code 1
